title: Eternal Hunts [Cataclysm & Mowzie's Mobs & Born in Chaos]
description: An addon for Mowzie's Mobs, Cataclysm and Born in Chaos that creates integration and adds new content.
body:
This mod was created during the development of the mod pack and includes a variety of content for mods such as Mowzie's Mobs, Cataclysm, and Born in Chaos. It only works with all three mods installed!

![Creative Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25db8296ffceb6f116d987d2cfef007704f64da6.png)
---

This mod adds a ton of new items!
The main ones are soul crystals and soul ingots.
To obtain soul crystals, you need to kill strong mobs and bosses, and you have a 50% chance of getting them (+10% per loot level)!

The mod also adds summoners for each boss, with a 120s cooldown and can only be summoned at the boss's spawn location.
For all summoners, armor, and accessories, you'll need a soul ingot, which is made from 3 soul crystals, 3 mods, a netherite ingot, an ignite ingot, and a darksteel ingot.

![soul ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a22c2b0d79d978d1ec823d7288ae0da57df9da62.png)

# Soul Armor

Soul armor is incredible armor! It combines the properties of armor from 3 mods!

![ARMOR+ACS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2a5942da4fe0d51094da924943d80ec81198f31.png)

<details>
<summary>Abilities</summary>

**Helmet**  
- Fire mobs ignore you  
- Active (key `H`): AoE Glowing (24 blocks) + Blazing Brand (16 blocks)  
- 10s cooldown  

**Chestplate**  
- On death: survive with 5 HP, gain Ghost Form (5s invincibility) + Fire Res (10s)  
- 6 min cooldown (Ghost Sickness)  

**Leggings**  
- 8% dodge melee / 15% dodge projectiles  
- 50% chance to apply Blazing Brand to attacker when hit  

**Boots**  
- -70% fall damage  
- Enhanced jump when sprinting  
- Active (key `B`): backstep dodge  
- 10s cooldown  

**Full set**  
- Immunity to fire, lightning, wither, poison, darkness, blindness  
- Permanent Resistance I + Strength II  

*Fire thorns on any piece: attacker burns for 3s*

</details>

# New accessories

<details>
<summary>Accessories</summary>

These accessories grant immunity to creatures associated with a specific mod. Crafting them will require a fair bit of work...

![acs1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4a3bb69479dc33e06bafec9e2a3cb110f703511.png)

![acs2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81c72b73f3c0fb5b944457607ea0616fb2d26667.png)

</details>
